prompt: Fix ping to local VVRP interface addresses
note: Added FWD loopback local delivery for HU FIB routes. Runtime injects the IP local-input service, which resolves the destination against VVRP interface IP state and returns ICMP replies through the local path into the ping reply inbox.
decisions: Keep FWD protocol-agnostic by injecting the IP local-delivery callback; never send local host routes through Ethernet.
